# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Bash script for deploying to AWS using the AWS CLI. The script should authenticate with AWS and perform deployment operations. Ensure the script can be used safely in both local development and CI/CD environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# This script deploys resources to AWS using the AWS CLI.
# It is designed to be safe and flexible for both local development and CI/CD environments.

# --- Configuration and Safety Settings ---
set -euo pipefail # Exit immediately if a command exits with a non-zero status.
                  # Exit if an undeclared variable is used.
                  # Exit if a command in a pipeline fails.
IFS=$'\n\t'       # Internal Field Separator set to newline and tab for robust parsing.

# --- Global Variables with Defaults ---
# AWS Region: Can be overridden by --region argument or AWS_REGION environment variable.
AWS_REGION="${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}"
# AWS Profile: Can be overridden by --profile argument or AWS_PROFILE environment variable.
# Leave empty by default to use the default profile or environment variables (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, etc.)
AWS_PROFILE="${AWS_PROFILE:-}"

# CloudFormation Specific Variables
CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH="" # Path to the CloudFormation template file
CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME=""    # Name of the CloudFormation stack
CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS=""    # Optional: Path to a parameters file or a string of key=value pairs
S3_DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET=""         # Optional: S3 bucket to upload CF template to (recommended for large templates)
DRY_RUN="false"                 # If true, commands will be printed but not executed.

# --- Helper Functions ---

# Function to display script usage
usage() {
    echo "Usage: $0 -t <template_path> -s <stack_name> [OPTIONS]"
    echo ""
    echo "Deploy a CloudFormation stack to AWS."
    echo ""
    echo "Required arguments:"
    echo "  -t, --template-path      Path to the CloudFormation template file (e.g., ./cfn/my-stack.yml)"
    echo "  -s, --stack-name         Name of the CloudFormation stack to deploy (e.g., my-application-stack)"
    echo ""
    echo "Optional arguments:"
    echo "  -r, --region             AWS Region (default: $AWS_REGION). Can also be set via AWS_REGION environment variable."
    echo "  -p, --profile            AWS Profile to use (e.g., my-dev-profile). Can also be set via AWS_PROFILE environment variable."
    echo "  -k, --parameters         CloudFormation parameters. Can be a path to a JSON/YAML file or a string"
    echo "                           like 'Param1=Value1 Param2=Value2'. These are passed to --parameter-overrides."
    echo "  -b, --s3-bucket          S3 bucket to upload the CloudFormation template to before deployment."
    echo "                           Required for templates larger than 51,200 bytes. e.g., my-template-bucket-123"
    echo "  -d, --dry-run            Perform a dry run. Commands will be printed but not executed."
    echo "  -h, --help               Display this help message."
    echo ""
    echo "Environment Variables (if not provided via arguments):"
    echo "  AWS_REGION               Default AWS region."
    echo "  AWS_PROFILE              Default AWS profile."
    echo ""
    echo "Example (local development):"
    echo "  AWS_PROFILE=dev $0 -r us-east-1 -t ./cfn/template.yaml -s my-dev-stack -k './cfn/params-dev.json'"
    echo "  $0 -t ./cfn/template.yaml -s my-prod-stack -r us-west-2 -p production-profile -b my-artifacts-bucket"
    echo ""
    echo "Example (CI/CD):"
    echo "  # AWS credentials (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_SESSION_TOKEN) would be set by CI/CD runner"
    echo "  $0 -t ./cfn/template.yaml -s my-ci-stack -r us-east-1 -k 'Environment=CI ServiceName=MyApp'"
    exit 1
}

# Function to check if AWS CLI is installed
check_aws_cli() {
    if ! command -v aws &>/dev/null; then
        echo "ERROR: AWS CLI is not installed or not in your PATH."
        echo "Please install it: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/userguide/cli-chap-install.html"
        exit 1
    fi
}

# Function to verify AWS authentication and identity
verify_aws_identity() {
    echo "--- Verifying AWS identity ---"
    local identity_output
    if identity_output=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --output json "${AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS[@]}" 2>/dev/null); then
        echo "Successfully authenticated to AWS."
        echo "Account: $(echo "$identity_output" | jq -r '.Account')"
        echo "User ARN: $(echo "$identity_output" | jq -r '.Arn')"
    else
        echo "ERROR: Failed to authenticate to AWS or retrieve caller identity."
        echo "Please ensure your AWS credentials are configured correctly."
        echo "  - Check ~/.aws/credentials and ~/.aws/config for profiles."
        echo "  - Check environment variables: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_SESSION_TOKEN."
        exit 1
    fi
    echo ""
}

# Function to deploy CloudFormation stack
deploy_cloudformation_stack() {
    echo "--- Initiating CloudFormation Deployment ---"

    local template_arg # This will be --template-file or --template-url
    local cf_template_location # This will be the actual path or S3 URL

    # If an S3 bucket is provided, upload the template first
    if [[ -n "$S3_DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET" ]]; then
        echo "Uploading CloudFormation template to S3 bucket: $S3_DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET"
        aws s3 cp "$CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH" "s3://$S3_DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET/$(basename "$CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH")" \
            "${AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS[@]}" || { echo "ERROR: Failed to upload template to S3."; exit 1; }
        cf_template_location="s3://$S3_DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET/$(basename "$CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH")"
        template_arg="--template-url"
    else
        cf_template_location="$CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH"
        template_arg="--template-file"
    fi

    local deploy_command=("aws" "cloudformation" "deploy"
        "${AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS[@]}"
        "$template_arg" "$cf_template_location"
        "--stack-name" "$CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME"
        "--capabilities" "CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM" "CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND" # Common capabilities, adjust as needed
    )

    # Add parameters if provided
    if [[ -n "$CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS" ]]; then
        if [[ -f "$CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS" ]]; then
            echo "Using CloudFormation parameters from file: $CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS"
            deploy_command+=("--parameter-overrides" "$(cat "$CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS")")
        else
            echo "Using inline CloudFormation parameters: $CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS"
            deploy_command+=("--parameter-overrides" "$CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS")
        fi
    fi

    echo "CloudFormation deployment command to be executed:"
    # Use printf %q to properly quote arguments for display
    printf '%q ' "${deploy_command[@]}"
    echo
    echo ""

    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
        echo "Dry run enabled. Skipping actual CloudFormation deployment."
    else
        echo "Executing CloudFormation deployment..."
        if ! "${deploy_command[@]}"; then
            echo "ERROR: CloudFormation deployment command failed."
            exit 1
        fi
        echo "CloudFormation deployment initiated successfully."

        # Optional: Wait for stack creation/update to complete
        echo "Waiting for stack '$CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME' to reach a stable state (CREATE_COMPLETE or UPDATE_COMPLETE)..."
        if ! aws cloudformation wait stack-create-complete --stack-name "$CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME" "${AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS[@]}" 2>/dev/null; then
            if ! aws cloudformation wait stack-update-complete --stack-name "$CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME" "${AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS[@]}"; then
                echo "ERROR: CloudFormation stack '$CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME' did not complete successfully."
                echo "Please check the AWS CloudFormation console for details: https://$AWS_REGION.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=$AWS_REGION#/stacks"
                exit 1
            fi
        fi
        echo "CloudFormation stack '$CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME' deployed successfully."
    fi
    echo "--- CloudFormation Deployment Complete ---"
}

# --- Main Script Logic ---

# Parse command line arguments
while [[ "$#" -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        -t|--template-path)
            CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH="$2"
            shift
            ;;
        -s|--stack-name)
            CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME="$2"
            shift
            ;;
        -r|--region)
            AWS_REGION="$2"
            shift
            ;;
        -p|--profile)
            AWS_PROFILE="$2"
            shift
            ;;
        -k|--parameters)
            CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS="$2"
            shift
            ;;
        -b|--s3-bucket)
            S3_DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET="$2"
            shift
            ;;
        -d|--dry-run)
            DRY_RUN="true"
            ;;
        -h|--help)
            usage
            ;;
        *)
            echo "Unknown parameter passed: $1"
            usage
            ;;
    esac
    shift
done

# --- Validate Inputs ---
if [[ -z "$CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: CloudFormation template path (-t or --template-path) is required."
    usage
fi

if [[ ! -f "$CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: CloudFormation template file not found: $CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH"
    exit 1
fi

if [[ -z "$CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: CloudFormation stack name (-s or --stack-name) is required."
    usage
fi

# --- Configure AWS CLI Common Arguments ---
AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS=()
if [[ -n "$AWS_REGION" ]]; then
    AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS+=("--region" "$AWS_REGION")
fi
if [[ -n "$AWS_PROFILE" ]]; then
    AWS_CLI_COMMON_ARGS+=("--profile" "$AWS_PROFILE")
fi

echo "--- Deployment Configuration ---"
echo "AWS Region:           $AWS_REGION"
echo "AWS Profile:          ${AWS_PROFILE:-<default/env_vars>}"
echo "CF Template Path:     $CLOUDFORMATION_TEMPLATE_PATH"
echo "CF Stack Name:        $CLOUDFORMATION_STACK_NAME"
echo "CF Parameters:        ${CLOUDFORMATION_PARAMETERS:-<none>}"
echo "S3 Deployment Bucket: ${S3_DEPLOYMENT_BUCKET:-<none, template not uploaded>}"
echo "Dry Run:              $DRY_RUN"
echo "--------------------------------"
echo ""

# --- Execute Deployment Steps ---
check_aws_cli
verify_aws_identity
deploy_cloudformation_stack

echo ""
echo "Deployment script finished."
exit 0
